creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pawel
Date: Sun Dec 21 19:13:56 UTC 2014
New revision: 375184
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/375184

Log:
  bspwm is a tiling window manager that represents windows as the leaves
  of a full binary tree. It is controlled and configured via bspc.

  WWW: https://github.com/baskerville/bspwm

  PR:		196129
  Submitted by:	Anton Tornqvist <antont@inbox.lv>

  head/x11-wm/bspwm/
  head/x11-wm/bspwm/Makefile

  head/x11-wm/bspwm/files/
  head/x11-wm/bspwm/files/patch-Makefile
  head/x11-wm/bspwm/pkg-descr
  head/x11-wm/bspwm/pkg-message
  head/x11-wm/bspwm/pkg-plist
